widget.name: Toolkeeper Looker
widget.description: Adds an «eye» button next to every file in amoCRM chats, notes and emails. Opens a modal preview for PDF, DOCX, XLSX, images, plain text, and legacy Office formats (.doc/.xls/.ppt/.pptx). No download required.

errors.unsupported: Format not yet supported. Please download the file instead.
errors.too_large: File is too large to preview (over {{limit}}). Please download it.
errors.converter_failed: Conversion service is unavailable. Try later or download the file.
